metadata.title: ああベツレヘムよ
metadata.subtitle: O Little Town of Bethlehem — Japanese (讃美歌 第二篇, 1910)
metadata.lyricist: Phillips Brooks (1835–1893) — Japanese translation by the editorial committee of 讃美歌 第二篇 (1910)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Original lyrics by Brooks (d. 1893) and tune by Redner (d. 1908) are PD by > 100 years. Japanese translation first appeared in 委員編『讃美歌 第二篇』警醒社・教文館 (1910) no. 64 — > 100 years ago. Japanese Wikisource hosts the full PD text with explicit copyright-expired markings
metadata.x_translator: Editorial committee of 讃美歌 第二篇 (1910)

chordpro:
{title: ああベツレヘムよ}
{subtitle: O Little Town of Bethlehem — Japanese, 讃美歌 第二篇 (1910) no. 64}
{key: F}
{time: 4/4}
{tempo: 76}

{start_of_verse: 1}
[F]ああベツ[C]レヘ[Dm]ムよ [Bb]などかひ[F]とり
aa betsurehemu yo, nadoka hitori
[F]ほしのみ[C]匂(にほ)[Dm]ひて [Bb]ふかくね[F]むる
hoshi nomi nioite, fukaku nemuru
[F]しらずや[C]こ[Dm]よひ [Bb]くらきそ[F]らに
shirazu ya koyoi, kuraki sora ni
[F]とこしへ[C]の[Dm]ひかり [Bb]てりわた[F]るを
tokoshie no hikari, teriwataru wo
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 2}
[F]ひとみな[C]ね[Dm]むりて [Bb]しらぬま[F]にぞ
hitomina nemurite, shiranu ma ni zo
[F]主(しゆ)なる[C]キ[Dm]リストは [Bb]うまれた[F]まふ
shu naru kirisuto wa, umare tamou
[F]あしたの[C]ほ[Dm]しよ [Bb]うたひま[F]つれ
ashita no hoshi yo, utai matsure
[F]かみには[C]み[Dm]さかえ [Bb]地(ち)にへい[F]わと
kami ni wa misakae, chi ni heiwa to
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 3}
[F]主(しゆ)のみ[C]わ[Dm]ざこそは [Bb]くすしけ[F]れや
shu no miwaza koso wa, kusushikere ya
[F]しづかに[C]め[Dm]ぐみの [Bb]つゆはく[F]だる
shizuka ni megumi no, tsuyu wa kudaru
[F]つみのこ[C]の[Dm]世(よ)に [Bb]かかるめ[F]ぐみ
tsumi no kono yo ni, kakaru megumi
[F]あめより[C]來[Dm](く)べしと [Bb]たれかは[F]知る
ameyori kubeshi to, tareka wa shiru
{end_of_verse}

{start_of_verse: 4}
[F]ああベツ[C]レ[Dm]ヘムの [Bb]きよきみ[F]こよ
aa betsurehemu no, kiyoki miko yo
[F]いましも[C]わ[Dm]れらに [Bb]くだりた[F]まへ
ima shimo warera ni, kudari tamae
[F]こころを[C]き[Dm]よめ [Bb]みやとな[F]して
kokoro wo kiyome, miya to nashite
[F]とはにす[C]み[Dm]たまへ [Bb]主(しゆ)よわが[C]主[F]よ
towa ni sumi tamae, shu yo waga shu yo
{end_of_verse}
